ddls:
CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the technology */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the technology (e.g., Data Science, Cloud, AI) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the technology was first added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the technology's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the technology (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention record */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology being mentioned */,
  "mentions_count" INTEGER /* Count of mentions for the specified year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "last_year_mentions" INTEGER /* Count of mentions for the previous year */,
  "last_year_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the technology in the previous year */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous year */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media source where the mention was found */,
  "mention_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the mention */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the mention (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source of the mention */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or excerpt from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Analytics, Sales, Marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, year-over-year comparison) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is public or private */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., mention increase, ranking change) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_sources" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media source */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media source */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media source (e.g., Blog, Social Media, Publication) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the media source */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the media source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Further categorization of the media source (e.g., blog, forum, news) */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the media source */,
  "last_crawled" TEXT /* Date when the source was last crawled for mentions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., report generation, data analysis) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
